settings.label: Enable ajax Add to Cart?
settings.info: If unchecked, this disables off screen cart that slides in when you add a product to cart. User will be taken directly to cart page instead.

settings.label: Set the default date for the datepicker
settings.info: Must be in this format: mm-dd-yyyy

settings.label: How many days will take to deliver?
settings.info: The number placed here represents the number of disabled days from today. If you place here 2 and today is Friday then Saturday and Sunday will not be available for delivery.
